# data/processed/ — Generated Database Files

**This folder is auto-generated. Do not manually put files here.**

---

## What goes here?

After Person 1 runs `python data/process_data.py`, this folder will contain:

| File | Contents |
|------|----------|
| `malatang.db` | SQLite database with cleaned restaurant + review data |

---

## This folder is excluded from git

`malatang.db` is a generated file — it should NOT be committed to GitHub.
Every team member should run `process_data.py` locally to generate their own copy.

---

## If this folder is empty

That means Person 1 hasn't run the data processing script yet.
Either run it yourself, or ask Person 1 to share the DB file directly.
